TCA Members - Example Roles: Quartile 1 band include, on average, a median entry-level product manager, a median entry-level data scientist, a median entry-level business development, or a 25th percentile senior product design manager.
Low-mid quartile roles include, on average, a median senior product designer, a median entry-level sales engineer, a median senior recruiter, or a 25th percentile senior product design manager.

Mid-upper quartile roles include, on average, a median senior product design manager, a 75th percentile senior product designer, a median senior ux researcher, or a 75th percentile senior hardware engineer.

This top-paying quartile would contain high-level leadership roles including C-Suite and Vice President-level executives as well as top-tier technical roles like a 90th percentile senior product manager, a median senior business development.
